creator: m.r.sopacua@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 177209
Patch to fix openssl 1.1. compatibilty

Log:
commit ad11101cf67116cb94538525ace901addf24e02b
Author: Melvyn Sopacua 
Date:   Sun Nov 20 14:17:00 2016 +0100

    net/qt4-network: OpenSSL 1.1 compat Phase 3

    - Final compatibility fixes for QSslContext [1]
    - Remove cipher->valid check as per OpenSSL wiki [2]

    Obtained from:  https://github.com/richmoore/qtbase/commit/9ad38be [1]
                    https://wiki.openssl.org/index.php/1.1_API_Changes [2]

commit b0dc4f412b36d6cc02c9030e701f40a154ac1dcf
Author: Melvyn Sopacua 
Date:   Sun Nov 20 01:58:23 2016 +0100

    net/qt4-network: OpenSSL 1.1 compat Phase 2

    - Port qsslkey: use D/RSA_bits for now opaque type

    Based on: https://github.com/richmoore/qtbase/commit/4e90ef8

commit 7de0f059c47ff7649dae1448f73f27ad21516ffe
Author: Melvyn Sopacua 
Date:   Sat Nov 19 15:39:51 2016 +0100

    net/qt4-network: OpenSSL 1.1 compat Phase 1

    Hand-merge upstream 320a9b and keep earlier version compatibility.

    Obtained from:  https://github.com/richmoore/qtbase/commit/320a91b
